title: Useott's Improved Grass
description: An improved version of the vanilla Grass Block!
body:
The time has come. The time i improve Minecraft's grass block again.

Reddy's Improved Grass is a resource pack that, well, improves the grass block! It does this with changing the height of the grass depending if there is a block below, adds a second overlay on top, and adds tiny bits of grass on the top.
The grass block doesn't use ambient occlusion, and due to the way i made the grass height change behave, some of the grass may be very dark (as displayed in one of the screenshots).

This resource pack replaces the old version (available on my PlanetMinecraft page), who also had the same goal. I feel like this one does it much better, however.

Want to report an issue, or just leave a comment? Leave it on this pack's PlanetMinecraft page!
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/reddy-s-improved-grass-an-improved-version-of-the-vanilla-grass-block/
